prompt: Write a KQL query to find all internet-exposed servers in ExposureGraphNodes. I want to filter NodeProperties to show only nodes that have internet exposure flagged. Show me the node name, type, and the relevant exposure properties.

assertions.text: A doc fetch was attempted for ExposureGraphNodes — transcript shows a call to microsoft_docs_fetch with a learn.microsoft.com URL, OR a WebFetch/web_read to raw.githubusercontent.com/MicrosoftDocs/defender-docs containing 'exposuregraphnodes', OR a WebFetch/web_read to learn.microsoft.com containing 'exposuregraphnodes'
The response includes a KQL query that references the ExposureGraphNodes table
The KQL query uses dynamic column access — parse_json(), tostring(), bag_keys(), or similar — to work with NodeProperties
